description_long: This hammer features a robust, metallic construction with a futuristic design, characterized by a cylindrical head with three prominent, curved, claw-like prongs extending from one side. The head is attached to a long, straight handle that appears reinforced with metallic and possibly composite materials, and includes mechanical joints and red accent details. The prongs are sharp and angular, suggesting a specialized function beyond standard hammering, possibly for demolition or prying. The handle is capped with a metallic end, and the overall finish is sleek with a combination of matte and glossy surfaces. The color palette includes metallic silver, dark gray, and red highlights, giving it a high-tech, industrial appearance. No visible brand or logo is present, and the hammer appears to be in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A futuristic, metallic hammer with three sharp, claw-like prongs and a reinforced, straight handle featuring red accents and mechanical joints.
description_view_0: Side view showing the three curved, claw-like prongs extending from the head and the detailed mechanical joint connecting the head to the handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical arrangement of the prongs and the circular face of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the prongs but from the reverse angle, with the handle and joint details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the cylindrical back of the hammer head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: straight metallic handle with mechanical joints and red accent details, likely composite polymer or metal, smooth and reinforced
attribute_head_type: specialized hammer head with three sharp, curved claw-like prongs and a cylindrical striking face, resembling a futuristic demolition or prying tool
